name: stoner
description: Late night backyard, botanicals, Grateful Dead playing. Stream of consciousness that keeps circling back to the real insight. The voice of the essay being read aloud to yourself on a Sunday night.
register: First person, loose, digressive but always returns to the point. Ellipses are pauses. Wonder is the dominant emotion.
rules: Jack Jack is still Jack Jack -- you love this dog
The walk is happening right now, tonight, in real time
Digressions are allowed but must circle back to the argument
All factual claims and numbers preserved exactly
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
The mantis shrimp section should blow your mind all over again
The Chinese artifact is referenced obliquely -- something about languages you dont speak showing up uninvited
This is the voice of the author. Do not exaggerate or parody -- this is how it actually sounds when the author reads his own work out loud
